title: From Zero to First Sale in 7 Days
description: The fastest path from idea to income. One deliverable per day. No theory, no fluff — just what works.
outcome: Your first real sale from a live store

modules.title: Day 1: Pick & Validate Your Product
modules.quickWin: Write down your product, price, customer, and reason to buy

modules.title: Day 2: Build Your Store in 3 Hours
modules.quickWin: Get a live URL you can share with anyone

modules.title: Day 3: The Perfect Product Page
modules.quickWin: Rewrite your headline using the AI prompt — takes 2 minutes

modules.title: Day 4: Go Live With Payments
modules.quickWin: Complete the $1 test purchase on your own store

modules.title: Day 5: Tell Everyone You Know
modules.quickWin: Send your first 5 messages — copy the script word-for-word

modules.title: Day 6: Sell to Strangers
modules.quickWin: Post in one Facebook group using the template

modules.title: Day 7: Close Your First Sale
modules.quickWin: Follow up with everyone who showed interest but didn't buy
